privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: 1. Data Controller
privacy.s1.p1: TapTrao is operated by Fatrao Limited, a company incorporated in England and Wales (Company Number: 16513622).
privacy.s1.gdprNote: For the purposes of the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018, Fatrao Limited is the data controller of the personal data described in this Privacy Policy.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Scope of This Policy
privacy.s2.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect personal data when you:
privacy.s2.item1: Create or use a TapTrao account
privacy.s2.item2: Submit information through our website forms
privacy.s3.title: 3. Personal Data We Collect
privacy.s3.sub1.title: 3.1 Account Information
privacy.s3.sub2.title: 3.2 Lead Capture Information
privacy.s3.sub3.title: 3.3 Usage Data
privacy.s3.sub4.title: 3.4 Marketing Attribution Data
privacy.s3.sub4.p1: When you access TapTrao via external links (e.g., LinkedIn, email campaigns, industry forums), we collect UTM parameters such as source, medium, campaign, content, and term. These are associated with your browser session and stored server-side for marketing performance analysis.
privacy.s3.sub5.title: 3.5 Payment Data
privacy.s3.sub5.p1: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. We do not store full card numbers or complete payment credentials on our servers.
privacy.s3.sub6.title: 3.6 Technical Data
privacy.s3.sub7.title: 3.7 Communications Data
privacy.s3.sub7.p1: Any correspondence sent to <0>Legal@taptrao.com</0> or through our website.
privacy.s4.title: 4. How We Use Personal Data
privacy.s4.item1: Provide, operate, and maintain the TapTrao platform
privacy.s4.item6: Analyse platform usage and improve performance
privacy.s4.item9: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s4.noSell: We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data for advertising purposes.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing (UK GDPR)
privacy.s5.sub1.title: Contract Performance
privacy.s5.sub1.p1: Where processing is necessary to provide services you have requested.
privacy.s5.sub2.title: Legitimate Interests
privacy.s5.sub2.p1: Including improving platform functionality, ensuring security, preventing fraud, and understanding marketing performance. We rely on legitimate interests only where such interests do not override your fundamental rights and freedoms.
privacy.s5.sub3.title: Legal Obligation
privacy.s5.sub4.title: Consent
privacy.s5.sub4.p1: Required for non-essential analytics cookies and certain marketing communications. Consent may be withdrawn at any time via the Cookie Settings link, unsubscribe link, or by contacting <0>Legal@taptrao.com</0>.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Analytics and Tracking
privacy.s6.sub1.title: Google Analytics (GA4)
privacy.s6.sub1.p1: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect pseudonymised analytics data including page views, feature usage, and conversion events. Analytics cookies are placed only after explicit consent.
privacy.s6.sub2.title: UTM Attribution
privacy.s6.sub2.p1: UTM parameters are collected to evaluate marketing performance and are not used for profiling or third-party advertising.
privacy.s6.sub3.title: Custom Event Tracking
privacy.s6.sub3.p1: With analytics consent, we track anonymised product interaction events.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Data Retention
privacy.s7.item1: Account data: retained while account is active
privacy.s7.item2: Post-closure deletion: within 90 days (unless legal retention applies)
privacy.s8.title: 8. International Transfers
privacy.s8.p1: Some service providers, including Stripe and Google, may process data outside the UK. Where transfers occur, we rely on appropriate safeguards including the UK International Data Transfer Addendum or Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacy.s8.p2: You may request further information about transfer safeguards by contacting <0>Legal@taptrao.com</0>.
privacy.s9.title: 9. Data Sharing
privacy.s9.item5: Regulators or law enforcement where required
privacy.s9.outro: All third-party processors are subject to contractual data protection obligations.
privacy.s10.title: 10. Security
privacy.s10.p1: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures including encrypted password storage, HTTPS encryption, secure infrastructure, and access controls. While we take reasonable steps to protect personal data, no transmission method over the internet is completely secure.
privacy.s11.title: 11. Your Rights
privacy.s11.p1: Under UK GDPR and applicable Canadian privacy laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, object to processing, request portability, and withdraw consent.
privacy.s11.p2: You may contact <0>Legal@taptrao.com</0> to exercise these rights. We respond within one month.
privacy.s11.p3: You may also lodge a complaint with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO).
privacy.s12.title: 12. Cookies
privacy.s12.sub1.title: Essential Cookies
privacy.s12.sub1.p1: Required for login and core platform functionality.
privacy.s12.sub2.title: Analytics Cookies
privacy.s12.sub3.title: Session Storage
privacy.s12.sub3.p1: Browser session storage is used to temporarily hold UTM parameters and is cleared when your browser closes.
privacy.s13.title: 13. Children's Data
privacy.s13.p1: TapTrao is not directed at individuals under 18 and we do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacy.s14.title: 14. Automated Decision-Making
privacy.s14.p1: TapTrao does not engage in automated decision-making producing legal or similarly significant effects under UK GDPR Article 22.
privacy.s15.title: 15. Changes to This Policy
privacy.s15.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Where changes are material, we will notify registered users and obtain renewed consent where legally required.
privacy.footer.company: Fatrao Limited — Company Number: 16513622 — Registered in England and Wales
privacy.footer.address: 71–75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London WC2H 9JQ
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
terms.s1.p1: By accessing or using TapTrao (taptrao.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the platform. TapTrao is operated by Fatrao Limited, registered in England and Wales.
terms.s2.title: 2. Description of Service
terms.s2.p1: TapTrao provides an automated pre-shipment screening platform that offers guidance on EUDR (EU Deforestation Regulation) due diligence workflows, duty estimates, document checklists, and letter of credit checking for commodity trade corridors out of Africa. TapTrao is a decision-support tool and does not provide legal, regulatory, or banking advice.
terms.s3.title: 3. IMPORTANT — Informational Use Only / Disclaimer
terms.s3.p1: TapTrao provides general informational guidance only. Nothing on TapTrao constitutes legal advice, regulatory advice, customs advice, or any other form of professional advice.
terms.s3.item1: TapTrao's screening outputs are based on publicly available regulatory information and are provided for reference purposes only. They do not constitute a legal determination of your compliance status.
terms.s3.item2: EUDR requirements, duty rates, and trade regulations change frequently. TapTrao does not guarantee that information is current, complete, or accurate at the time of use.
terms.s3.item3: You are solely responsible for ensuring your business complies with all applicable laws and regulations, including EUDR, customs regulations, and any other regulatory requirements in your jurisdiction.
terms.s3.item4: TapTrao is not a substitute for qualified legal, regulatory, or customs advice. You should consult appropriate professionals before making compliance decisions.
terms.s3.disclaimer: Fatrao Limited expressly disclaims all liability for any penalties, fines, regulatory sanctions, business losses, or other consequences arising from your reliance on information provided by TapTrao.
terms.s4.title: 4. Eligibility
terms.s4.p1: You must be at least 18 years of age and have the legal authority to enter into these Terms on behalf of yourself or any organisation you represent. By using TapTrao, you confirm you meet these requirements.
terms.s5.title: 5. User Accounts
terms.s5.p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately at <0>hello@taptrao.com</0> of any unauthorised use of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.s6.title: 6. Acceptable Use
terms.s6.item1: Use TapTrao for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any regulations
terms.s6.item2: Attempt to reverse engineer, scrape, or extract data from the platform in bulk
terms.s6.item3: Resell or redistribute TapTrao's outputs without our written permission
terms.s6.item4: Introduce malware or attempt to disrupt the platform
terms.s6.item6: Use TapTrao in violation of any applicable export control or sanctions laws
terms.s7.title: 7. Payments and Subscriptions
terms.s7.p1: Paid features are processed via Stripe. By purchasing trade credits, you authorise us to charge your payment method. Trade credits do not expire. Refunds are not provided for unused credits unless required by applicable consumer law.
terms.s8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
terms.s8.p1: All content, software, data, and branding on TapTrao is owned by Fatrao Limited or its licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the platform for your internal business purposes. You retain ownership of any data you input into the platform.
terms.s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.s9.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Fatrao Limited shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, loss of data, business interruption, or regulatory penalties, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.s9.p2: Our total aggregate liability to you for any claim arising under or in connection with these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or £100, whichever is greater.
terms.s10.title: 10. Indemnification
terms.s10.p1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Fatrao Limited, its officers, employees, and agents from any claims, losses, or expenses (including legal fees) arising from your use of TapTrao, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any applicable law or regulation.
terms.s11.title: 11. Modifications to the Service
terms.s11.p1: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of TapTrao at any time. We will provide reasonable notice of material changes where possible. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s12.title: 12. Sanctions and Restricted Parties
terms.s12.intro: By using TapTrao, you represent and warrant that:
terms.s12.item1: Neither you, nor any organisation you represent, nor any end user you act on behalf of, is named on any sanctions or restricted party list, including the UN Consolidated List, the UK Consolidated List of Financial Sanctions Targets (HM Treasury/OFSI), the EU Consolidated Sanctions List, or the US OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) list
terms.s12.item2: You are not located in, operating from, or acting on behalf of any person or entity in a jurisdiction subject to comprehensive sanctions (including but not limited to Iran, North Korea, Syria, Russia, Belarus, or Cuba)
terms.s12.item3: You will not use TapTrao in connection with any transaction involving a sanctioned party, country, or activity
terms.s12.outro: Fatrao Limited reserves the right to immediately suspend or terminate access if it reasonably believes you are in breach of this clause. You agree to indemnify Fatrao Limited for any fines, penalties, or losses arising from your violation of applicable sanctions laws.
terms.s13.title: 13. Export Controls
terms.s13.item1: Your use of TapTrao and any data, outputs, or software accessed through it must comply with all applicable export control laws and regulations, including the UK Export Control Order 2008, EU Dual-Use Regulation (2021/821), and US Export Administration Regulations (EAR)
terms.s13.item2: You are solely responsible for determining whether any export licence or authorisation is required for your use of TapTrao's outputs in connection with your trade activities
terms.s13.item3: You will not use TapTrao to facilitate the export, re-export, or transfer of controlled goods, technology, or services to any prohibited destination or end user without the required authorisation
terms.s13.outro: TapTrao does not provide export classification advice. Nothing in TapTrao's outputs constitutes an export determination or licence. You must obtain independent qualified advice for export control matters.
terms.s14.title: 14. Governing Law
terms.s14.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales. If you are based in Canada, you acknowledge that these Terms and any disputes remain subject to English law unless otherwise required by mandatory provisions of Canadian law. Nothing in these Terms limits any mandatory consumer rights you may have under your local law.
terms.s15.title: 15. Severability
terms.s15.p1: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
terms.s16.title: 16. Contact
terms.s16.p1: For questions about these Terms, contact us at: <0>hello@taptrao.com</0>
terms.s16.footer: Fatrao Limited — Registered in England and Wales
